The young generation constantly faces significant challenges. Although they have many innovative ideas to contribute to the country, the lack of proper policies makes it difficult to kickstart these ideas. As they grow older, societal expectations to support their families arise, making it challenging to continue pursuing these ideas. Consequently, many are compelled to go abroad for better income, education, or training. The allure of a better world often blinds Nepalese individuals, and the high rates of corruption further discourage them from investing in Nepal.
